enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Vaadi Potta Pulla Veliye conveys a playful and humorous take on love and relationships, reflecting the light-hearted nature of the movie.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kaalam Maari Pochu, this song is performed during a lively scene that emphasizes celebration and fun, aligning with the movie's comedic tone.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Vadivelu, known for his unique style and comedic timing.

When was this song released?

Vaadi Potta Pulla Veliye was released on April 3, 1996, as part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaadi Potta Pulla Veliye, the lively atmosphere of Kaalam Maari Pochu is brought to life through Vadivelu's energetic performance. The song captures the essence of joy and celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. With its catchy lyrics and upbeat rhythm, it evokes feelings of happiness and fun. This track stands out as a memorable highlight in the film, showcasing the playful side of love and relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaadi Potta Pulla Veliye from Kaalam Maari Pochu is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases Vadivelu's unique comedic flair. This song perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy, making it a timeless favorite for parties. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it's sure to get everyone on their feet!
stanzaMeanings: You are a girl who has been spoiled, my life has been troubled by you, my dear.
Are you going to leave me or stay? You came into my life on the very first night.
You are a girl who has been spoiled, my life has been troubled by you, my dear.
After tying the knot, it shouldn't be broken; it shouldn't be loosened, it shouldn't be ignored... do you understand?
After the wedding, it shouldn't be delayed; it shouldn't be changed; it shouldn't be ignored...
Is it that night when you gave milk? Is that you, my beautiful?
The last night ended, and everything got wet in the water.
The last night ended, and I cried in the water.
You are a girl who has been spoiled, my life has been troubled by you, my dear.
I swear on the water, I won't let you go; I won't let you go without tying you up. I promise...
In the month of August, I won't eat without you, I won't be scared anymore.
If I see someone, I will think of you, and I will cry at your door.
The bottle is empty, I have become a drunkard... if the whole bottle is empty, I have become a fool...
You are a girl who has been spoiled, my life has been troubled by you, my dear.
Are you going to leave me or stay? You came into my life on the very first night.
You are a girl who has been spoiled, my life has been troubled by you, my dear.
